name: Prominent Financial Consultants
description_short: Miami-based tax filing and accounting firm offering bookkeeping, tax strategy, and QuickBooks setup for small businesses. Monthly plans start at $549 with a 15-day free trial.
description_long:
Prominent Financial Consultants is a tax and accounting services firm based in Miami, Florida, serving small business owners across multiple industries. The company positions itself as an alternative to traditional CPAs, combining bookkeeping, tax strategy, and dedicated CPA support into bundled monthly plans rather than hourly or project-based billing.

The company offers comprehensive accounting services including chart of accounts review, document organization, QuickBooks setup, SBA business plan development, monthly bookkeeping, tax filing and strategy, and ongoing financial dashboard access. All plans include a dedicated CPA and are presented as including "over $1,000 in onboarding value." They serve nine specific industries including restaurants, e-commerce, real estate, construction, medical practices, transportation, professional services, and consulting agencies. Customer testimonials highlight time savings (11-15+ hours monthly) and tax deductions discovery ($9K-$14K average savings).

The company distinguishes itself through predictable monthly pricing with no long-term contracts, inclusion of a dedicated CPA on every plan, and industry-specific expertise. Marketing emphasizes proactive tax planning (knowing tax liability months in advance rather than at tax season), document organization to eliminate weekend bookkeeping, and finding missed deductions. They claim 250+ business clients, 100% accuracy rates, 15-minute average response times, and $2.4M+ in cumulative tax savings.

While the website presents compelling testimonials and efficiency claims, the service is fundamentally tax preparation and accounting consulting rather than financing or lending. The categorization as "business-loans" appears to be a mismatch—this is a professional services firm without lending, credit products, or financing mechanisms. For business owners seeking accounting support with predictable costs, the flat-fee model and free trial offer lower risk entry, though pricing ($549+/month) may be steep for very small operations.
address: 1701 Ponce de Leon Blvd Suite 305, Coral Gables, FL 33134

company_info.headquarters: 1701 Ponce de Leon Blvd Suite 305, Coral Gables, FL 33134

pros: 15-day free trial with no credit card required—customers can test services before committing
All-inclusive monthly plans include dedicated CPA, bookkeeping, and tax strategy (no hidden hourly fees)
No long-term contracts; cancel anytime policy reduces financial lock-in
Industry-specific services (9 specialized industries) rather than one-size-fits-all approach
Proactive tax planning enables businesses to know tax liability months in advance, not at April deadline
Onboarding includes $1,000+ in value (chart of accounts, document organization, QuickBooks setup, business plan)
Bilingual services available (Spanish language support noted on homepage)
cons: Starting price of $549/month may be unaffordable for sole proprietors or pre-revenue businesses
Claims of $9K-$14K average tax savings and 100% accuracy are unverifiable marketing claims not substantiated by independent audits
No pricing transparency shown for different plan tiers—customers must request a quote, making comparison shopping difficult
Located in Miami, Florida only; no clear indication of remote service availability or nationwide coverage despite "50 states coverage" claim
No independent reviews, certifications, or third-party ratings provided on their website; customer testimonials are provided by the company itself
best_for: Small business owners (restaurants, agencies, real estate, e-commerce) tired of manual bookkeeping and QuickBooks management
Self-employed professionals and contractors seeking proactive tax planning rather than reactive tax filing at year-end
Business owners who want a flat, predictable monthly accounting cost instead of hourly CPA rates
Companies currently working with traditional CPAs who may be missing deductions or lack ongoing financial visibility
diagnosis: Prominent Financial Consultants is best for established small business owners seeking outsourced accounting and tax strategy under a flat monthly fee model with dedicated CPA access. The main caveat is that this is a professional services firm providing tax preparation and bookkeeping—not a lender—and its $549+ monthly cost requires sufficient business revenue to justify the expense; it is not suitable for pre-revenue startups or very small sole proprietorships.
services: Chart of accounts review and optimization
Proactive tax strategy and planning (quarterly estimates, year-round planning)
Financial dashboard and reporting (cash balance, tax savings, compliance status)
Ongoing compliance monitoring and filing deadline alerts
